type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Previous method for estimating soil stockpiles: based on stockpile footprint (which was an underestimation)
Current method for estimating soil stockpiles: assumed trapezoidal stockpile and used footprint dimensions to calculate exposed stockpile surface area
Reason: More accurate estimate of exposed surface contributing to fugitive releases

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Previous method for estimating soil stockpiles: based on stockpile footprint (which was an underestimation)
Current method for estimating soil stockpiles: assumed trapezoidal stockpile and used footprint dimensions to calculate exposed stockpile surface area
Reason: More accurate estimate of exposed surface contributing to fugitive releases
